titleStmt.title: SII 22.568: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 568. (A.R. No. 568 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, MINIKI On a rock called the Minikibaṇḍa near the village Kulōttuṅga Chōḷa (I)-39th year (1108 A.D.)

summary.p: This begins with a passage (in faulty Sanskrit) consisting of some birudas such as Jāhnavīkulāmala, Khaḍgaikaprahāra, Koṅkuṇipadma and Padmamahādhirāja, and followed by the introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc. of king Kulōttuṅga I who is called here Vīra-Rājēndra-Chōḷa. But preceding his name and regnal year are given the titles Paramaṇḍalāditya, Virudarājabhayaṅkara, Dushṭaragaṇḍa, Rājēndraśōḻakshatriya, Gaṅganuḻambaṉ and Muḷvāy-maṇḍalikaṉ, introducing the chief Sokkanāyaṉ, son of Nuḷambadēvar. This feudatory is said to have constructed a channel from the big tank at Uppanelli in Mudukurukki situated in Vaḍapuli-nāḍu a division of Perumbāṇappāḍi in Nigariliśōḻa maṇḍalam. His son Nuḷambadēvaṉ claims to have improved this channel.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . svasti jidam bhagavatā gatapunat gganatābhina patmanābhina śrīmat jatnavikulāmala śrīkhaḍagaikaprahāra gaṇḍa ta
mahilāstambha laddhabalaparākrama Aṣobhaladdhayā ru
ṇāri gaṇobhadāra śrīmat koṅkuṇi patma patma mahā
dhirāja . svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virum
pa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟaṉta maṇimuṭi cū
ṭi villavar nilaikeṭa minavar kulaitara Āṉai maṉnavar Ikaliḻaṉ timi
tarat tikkaṉaittuṉ taṉ cakranaṭātti Icaiya Aviṣegam paṇṇi vicaiya siṅhā
sanattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya kovirāja keca
ri paṉmarāna cakkaravatti paramaṇṭalātitta virutarāja bhayaṅkara tuṭṭara kaṇ
ṭa Irājentracoḻa kṣatriyaṉ kaṅkaṉuḷampaṉ muḷvāy maṇṭalikaṉ
ṉuḷampatevar makaṉ cokkaṉāya neṉ vira Irājentra coḻa
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9āvatu nikarilicoḻa maṇṭa
lattup perum pāṇappāṭi vaṭapuli nāṭṭu mutuku
ṟukkiyil Uppanellip periyerikku kālkaṇ
ṭeṉ cokkanāya neṉ . Eṅkaḷaiyyaṉ cokka
nāyaṉ kaṇṭa kālai viḷaṅkakkaṇṭeṉ ṉu .
ḷampa tevaneṉ caccaraṉ meṭṭi tāmalūr maṉnavaṉ
Āvai kāvilaṉ Aracamikāmaṉ kāvalar pukaḻ noṭitaṉ tekka(ṇ)
ṇṭaṉ kaṭṭiya kaḻaṟkāl tuṭṭarātitta ṉaya muyaṉṟacaccaṉ meṭṭi
muṉivar kovaṉ muḷvāyṉuḷampaṉ cokkanāyaṉ kaṇṭikāvala Ali
yeṉṟu vilaṅkap pecinār Ūrākil keṅkaik karaiyiṟ kurāṟ pa
cuvaik koṉṟāṉ pukka narakattiṟ pukuvāṉ . svamasta .
Digital edition of SII 22.568 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
